feed.title: Probus - International Journal of Romance Linguistics
feed.subtitle: Latest articles from Probus - International Journal of Romance Linguistics (De Gruyter)

entry.title: Introduction to the special issue of Probus on Romance phonetics and phonology
entry.summary: Authors: Sonia Colina, Travis Bradley DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/probus-2025-0014 Pages: Page range: 1-5

entry.title: The acoustic manifestation of stress and focus in Romanian
entry.summary: Authors: Laura Spinu DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/probus-2026-0001 Pages: Page range: 7-32

entry.title: Acoustic correlates of lexical stress in Córdoba Spanish
entry.summary: Authors: Laura Colantoni, José Ignacio Hualde, Natalia Rigonatto DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/probus-2026-0002 Pages: Page range: 33-63

entry.title: Metaphony in the Tricase Southern Salentino variety: acoustic, articulatory, and phonological analysis
entry.summary: Authors: Andrea Calabrese, Mirko Grimaldi DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/probus-2026-0005 Pages: Page range: 65-117

entry.title: Latin liquid dissimilation and the relevance of phonological structure
entry.summary: Authors: Haike Jacobs DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/probus-2025-0017 Pages: Page range: 119-140

entry.title: Prosodic and morphological conditionings in Valencian vowel harmony
entry.summary: Authors: Ricard Herrero, Jesús Jiménez, Maria-Rosa Lloret DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/probus-2025-0013 Pages: Page range: 141-170

entry.title: Apocope and word-final consonants in Italo-Romance
entry.summary: Authors: Martin Krämer DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/probus-2025-0012 Pages: Page range: 171-210
